headline: Intel Stock Soars Nearly 20% Overnight As Jim Cramer Says 'Paranoid' INTC Is Back, Gene Munster Notes AI Boom Still Early
summary: On Thursday, Intel Corporation climbed nearly 19.95% in after-hours trading to $80.10 after closing at $66.78, up 2.31% in the regular session, following stronger-than-expected first-quarter results. Intel Earnings Crush Estimates, Stock Jumps The chipmaker reported earnings of 29 cents per share, far exceeding the consensus estimate of 1 cent.
